## Topic Name

<!-- What is the pattern or technique called? -->

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- In 2-3 sentences, what breaks without this pattern? -->

## Why should it be in craft-code?

<!-- Is it underrepresented in tutorials? Commonly misunderstood? Critical for production? -->

## Difficulty level

- [ ] ⭐ Beginner-friendly
- [ ] ⭐⭐ Intermediate
- [ ] ⭐⭐⭐ Advanced
- [ ] ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Expert

## Are you willing to write it?

- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, just proposing — happy for someone else to take it
